creator: antarex@land.ru
text:
Sorry for my bad English...

I am successfully install from USB flash drive FreeBSD-8.1-Release-i386,
but can't install FreeBSD-8.2-BETA1-i386.

FreeBSD installer says after ports install: "Attempting an install all
selected distibutions". And after that: "The commit operation completed
with errors. Not updating /etc files".

How-To-Repeat: Try to install FreeBSD-8.2-BETA1-i386-memstick.img
